name: Carne Seca (Another Jerky Recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients to make marinade and soak meat in marinade for 24 hours.
2. Remove meat from marinade and place in oven or smoker for 7-8 hours at about 150-200 degrees.
3. The jerky is done when the meat has turned brown, feels hard, and is dry to the touch.
